In this video we can look at Braviso which is a free social e-commerce application that will allow you to make money by selling their products anywhere on the internet. Basically you decide how much money you want to make by you setting your own price and the process is in automated. So essentially what happens is you choose which products you want to be able to sell to your customers. You then attract sauce shoppers, you drive traffic to your B store and then you make money. The way it works is a manufacturer will sell their products at a wholesale price and you will get the price how much it costs with a recommended retail price. You then set the price that you want to sell those products at in your store and you keep the difference as you are earning commission. The great thing is the Braviso manufacturers will do all the shipping and it will be sent out to your customers direct so you don't have to handle any goods. You just have to basically drive traffic so it's an equivalent of a drop shipping store. To sign up for the account as you can see here nice big orange button we just go through the sign up process. So let's have a look now we sign up now. Select yourself a username or password, confirm your password, email address, confirm email address, choose a B store name which will be like this it will have braviso.com my B store and then your name. So make it something that you want to have. Through in the characters from the capture image agree to the terms of conservice and that you are over 13 and sign up. So we are going to go through and fill out these information now and then hit the sign up button. As you can see here the benefits to braviso is that 20 to 40% verifiable profits where you set up your own markups. You get free unlimited B stores with fully commerce functionality. At the time of doing this video there is no extras, there is no platinum or gold stores. Everybody has a free store, everybody has the same benefits from the start. You have complete control over the products, you have a comprehensive promotional tools to attract buyers, you can own the customer without competition from braviso which is important and they take care of the order fulfillment returns and also the customer service if there is any issues. So I am going to go through and fill out now and we will move on to the next step. So once you have entered in your details you now choose to set up your store so you choose a theme for your B store so you can choose how you want the layout to be and then you can add products to your B store by keywords or by category samples. So it says here products related to each keyword term such as sports, music, shirts, digital it will be added to your B store, you have complete control over the products in your store and can edit price, description, images etc. Then you enter up to four different keyword terms and if you would rather add individual products create an empty B store by leaving the keywords blank, go to the B store manager page and click on add products. So we are going to choose keywords and we are going to leave it blank and here it says the available markup for each product is the difference between the braviso wholesale price and your manufacturer selected suggested retail. Markups higher than 100% are allowed so if you wanted to markup you could put 120% so it is entirely up to you. So you set your initial percentage, default is 90% and the head set up your store so we will just choose a theme and then we hit set up store. So as you can see here it says congratulations test store you have successfully completed your B store set up, preview your store here, start promoting my store, get a widget this will display different products from your B store on your blog or website so you can have it showing your products and you can send an email to people know if you want to to invite friends and then you are done you can actually manage your store, go into the section and log out. So if you look at our preview store you can see that moment we don't have any products in here and it has worked through Google checkout PayPal and has delivery via UPS. So let's move on to managing my B store and you can visit at any time you can promote with partners you can send email, widget builder, list on Google base which is a good way of getting traffic, search engine tools, promotional tools you can edit and set up Google analytics, edit the seller profile, the details, the theme, ad products, watch the ad products tutorial or create a new store. So let's say for a moment you wanted to perhaps sell cell phone cases you go to ad products and you look for the particular out of all the different products that they were having their range which is at the moment is more and they are growing all the time. So we go here for cell phone cases and we can see the different products if you want to click then we can have a look. You see a bigger description, information here and it says sell this and make $1.24. So if you like the look of the case you add it to your list, let's put a few on here that we are going to sell. We can choose details to see the actual description and go back. So if you want to add these products we here add, you set your markup and price and then hit confirm. As you can see it says products with success value at your store what would you like to do now, you can either carry on going to the catalogue or you can check your store. So if we check our store we can see at the moment that we have our products and the markup price has been entered in to show how much they will be and if people come along you make the difference between what the initial price was wholesale and the retail price that you have set. So that is straight forward and simple and easy to do. Just to go through some of the information here, if you are adding products you can change the theme which will change the color. You can edit your B store details if we click this one here. You have your B store name and you can write a tag line about your store. You can put in a logo if you want to by creating a logo and uploading it here. You can hide this site from buyers if you want to and can shop as a message from the store. You can put yes or no if you choose yes. They will then be able to send you messages directly via the store and then just hit update. If you want to edit the seller profile you click that one and in this section you just basically put in an image profile, profile title and text. You can put it about yourself or your store or your product. If you had a photograph maybe of your pet your hour and he is wearing his latest dog coat. You can have that as your profile image and information about your dog and the pet supplies you are selling. Your favorite sites which can be linked to your other products and services you can put in here or perhaps an ebook if you have one or a video course that you are selling as an affiliate. Have those in here as your favorite links. Display other stores if you want to and hide profile is entirely up to you and hit update and that's as easy as that to edit your profile within the barista store. The Google Analytics section will allow you to log into Google and get the information where you set up and you post it back into here. You put in your analytics code here and save and then Google Analytics from your account will actually track the traffic and trends of your site and your barista store. So it's useful if you want to be able to see that and it's a great way of seeing how your traffic is performing on your website. As far as promoting your store they have got a very detailed page here and it's just promote tutorial and talks to you about how you can promote your B store and attract shopper traffic. You can use widgets and there's a widget instruction for a builder here to have it on your blogs and sites. You can actually embed your store very easily using iframes and frame sets. The iframe you just basically just copy this and it has you just put in your affiliate your URL to your actual store you place in here and then you paste this into your page and they can have your store show up on any of your websites. So you can have it showing on any niche site you have. You can list on Google base you can actually promote products within eBay it says you're allowed to do that here and it tells you the process and how you then ship the product to the person once they've purchased. They've got some search engine tools you can make use of and you can invite people you know with a list of course via email and there's many other ways you could write articles, drive traffic to your B store in the same way you would any other site. And there's detailed instructions for listing your products on eBay here and also how to customise your widget with the widget builder. Once you click the My Brovisa link you'll see down here your stores that you've created you can create more if you want to at this time there's no restriction on the number of stores you can create. Here you can see your sales activity, performance reports and earnings. You can see any purchases that you've personally made as well, the history and your information such as changing your password, your email, manage your address and edit a set of information. And that's simple and easily how you use Brovisa to start promoting products and getting sales on the internet.
